beats.title: Your First Paycheck
beats.content: Your first honest SimCoin. Ray spots you counting it. 'Don't spend it all in one place. Actually... spend it. Money moves the city.'

beats.title: Crossing the Line
beats.content: The streets notice. Ghost's voice echoes in your head: 'Some doors... don't open back.' Your reputation shifts.

beats.title: Known Quantity
beats.content: People start recognizing your name. Ms. Chen nods when you pass. 'Keep this trajectory. The city watches.'

beats.title: City Influencer
beats.content: The Broker sends you a cold message: 'Your volume is noted. Continue.' In Broker terms, that's a compliment.

beats.title: Legend Status
beats.content: Lucky Lou buys you a drink. 'Heard about you. Knew you'd make it. Don't forget where you started.'

beats.title: Business Owner
beats.content: Ms. Chen personally inspects your new venture. 'This city was built by people like you. Don't waste it.'

beats.title: Shareholder
beats.content: The Broker's voice crackles through your terminal. 'Now you're in the game. Don't blink.'

beats.title: Crew Member
beats.content: Your new faction welcomes you. Ghost whispers: 'Family now. Family protects. Family demands.'

beats.title: Crew Leader
beats.content: Your faction charter is filed. Marco shakes your hand. 'You're running things now. Don't mess it up.'

beats.title: The Big Score
beats.content: The crew splits the take. Lucky Lou appears from nowhere. 'Knew you had it in you. Drinks on me.'

beats.title: Holding Cell
beats.content: Ray's voice echoes through the bars. 'Told you. Eyes open. Now you learn the hard way.'

beats.title: New Beginning
beats.content: The city blurs. When vision clears, you're back where you started. But different. 'Welcome back.' — Ghost
